description: Parse structured clinical data — demographics (age, sex), vital signs (T, BP, HR, RR, SpO2), and medications (drug/dose/route/frequency) — from a report into JSON (read-only).
rules: read-only — never edits the input report
extracts demographics, vital_signs and medications via regex into a single JSON object
fields absent from the source are simply omitted (empty sub-objects/lists are valid)
usage: Set REPORT_FILE (a SOAP note / H&P / report .md). Output: clinical_data.json.
limitation: Regex extraction expects the source's labelled formats (e.g. 'BP: 142/88', '40 mg PO BID'); free-form prose may not match. Requires python3 (stdlib only).
